metadata.title: Cusco Mascca Tours | Tours & VIP Taxi in Cusco, Peru
metadata.description: Travel agency in Cusco: Machu Picchu tours, Rainbow Mountain, Sacred Valley & VIP airport taxi. Best rates guaranteed, no hidden fees. Book 24/7.

footer.tagline: Best rates guaranteed · No hidden fees · 24/7 bookings

hero.title: Discover the Magic of Cusco
hero.subtitle: Tours & Private Mobility — 24/7
hero.slogan: Best rate guaranteed | No hidden fees | 24/7 bookings

sections.featuredToursDesc: Hand-picked experiences with transparent pricing and expert guides.
sections.privateMobilityDesc: Modern vehicles and professional drivers — your schedule, your route.
sections.galleryDesc: Moments from Cusco, the Sacred Valley, and beyond.
sections.finalCtaDesc: Message us on WhatsApp — we reply fast and tailor every trip.

fleet.title: Own fleet
fleet.desc: Vehicles we maintain and operate for punctual, safe rides.

guides.title: Local guides
guides.desc: Passionate cusqueños who bring history and culture to life.

support.title: 24/7 support
support.desc: Assistance before and during your trip, whenever you need it.

value.title: Fair pricing
value.desc: Clear rates with no hidden fees — value you can trust.

mobility.title: Private mobility
mobility.intro: Airport pickups, station runs, and long-distance routes across the region.

airport-hotel-cusco.name: Airport ↔ Cusco hotel
airport-hotel-cusco.desc: Direct transfer between the airport and your accommodation in Cusco.

airport-poroy.name: Airport ↔ Poroy station
airport-poroy.desc: Connection for trains to Machu Picchu (Poroy station).

airport-ollantaytambo.name: Airport ↔ Ollantaytambo
airport-ollantaytambo.desc: Transfer to the heart of the Sacred Valley.

city-tour-5h.name: City tour 5h
city-tour-5h.desc: Urban loop through Cusco’s main highlights.

city-tour-pisac-9h.name: City tour + Pisac 9h
city-tour-pisac-9h.desc: Combined day: imperial city and Pisac archaeological market.

laguna-humantay.name: Humantay Lagoon
laguna-humantay.desc: Private mobility for this high-altitude excursion.

puente-qeswachaka-4-lagos.name: Q'eswachaka bridge + 4 lagoons
puente-qeswachaka-4-lagos.desc: Route to the rope bridge and lagoon circuit.

maras-moray-ruta-movilidad.name: Maras Moray Salt Mines
maras-moray-ruta-movilidad.desc: Private transfer to circular terraces and salt pans.

tours.pageDesc: Explore Cusco and its icons with bilingual guides and comfortable transport.

machu-picchu-full-day.name: Machu Picchu Full Day
machu-picchu-full-day.short: The citadel in one unforgettable day.
machu-picchu-full-day.long: Journey to one of the New Wonders of the World with coordinated logistics, experienced guidance, and time to soak in the scenery.

city-tour-cusco.name: City Tour Cusco
city-tour-cusco.long: Discover Sacsayhuamán, Qorikancha, and the vibrant streets of the imperial capital.

montana-de-colores.name: Rainbow Mountain
montana-de-colores.long: Early departure, acclimatization tips, and guided support on a high-altitude trek to the rainbow mountain.

maras-moray-minas-de-sal.name: Maras Moray Salt Mines
maras-moray-minas-de-sal.short: Circular terraces and ancient salt pans.
maras-moray-minas-de-sal.long: Visit Moray’s agricultural laboratory and the Maras salt ponds with time for photos and local culture.

valle-sur.name: South Valley
valle-sur.long: A circuit through the south valley: Inca hydraulics, pre-Inca Pikillacta, and the “Sistine Chapel of the Americas.”

valle-sagrado-vip.name: Sacred Valley VIP
valle-sagrado-vip.long: Sacred Valley with a VIP focus: comfort, flexible pacing, and the best viewpoints and sites for your interests.

galleryPage.title: Gallery
galleryPage.subtitle: Cusco, Machu Picchu, and the Sacred Valley through our lens.

tips.title: Machu Picchu tips
tips.subtitle: Practical advice for a smooth visit.

tickets.title: Book tickets early
tickets.body: Entrances sell out — reserve weeks ahead in high season.

hydrate.title: Hydrate and acclimatize
hydrate.body: Spend 1–2 days in Cusco before intense hikes; drink water often.

layers.title: Dress in layers
layers.body: Mountain weather shifts fast — sun, wind, and rain in one day.

cash.title: Carry small cash
cash.body: Some villages and restrooms only accept soles in cash.

faqPage.title: FAQ
faqPage.subtitle: Answers before you pack your bags.

q1.q: Do you pick up at the airport?
q1.a: Yes — we offer private transfers from Alejandro Velasco Astete Airport to your hotel in Cusco.

q2.a: Our team offers Spanish and English guidance on scheduled tours.

q3.a: Absolutely — share dates, group size, and interests and we’ll tailor options.

q4.a: You can confirm via WhatsApp or use our online form with PayPal for secure payment.

t1.name: Emma, UK
t1.text: Seamless Machu Picchu day — punctual driver, knowledgeable guide, stunning views.

t2.name: Carlos, México
t2.text: Sacred Valley VIP exceeded expectations — comfort, great pacing, and an excellent guide.

t3.name: Sophie, Canada
t3.text: Airport transfer and city tour were flawless — highly recommend Mascca.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We’re here to plan your Cusco adventure. Email info@masccatourscusco.com or message us on WhatsApp.

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.subtitle: Choose a tour or private transfer, add the details, then pay with PayPal or send the full summary on WhatsApp in one tap.
reservations.successRedirect: After payment you’ll be redirected to a thank-you page.
reservations.perGroupNote: Tours: per person in a group. Mobility: vehicle rate for the route you chose.
reservations.paypalHint: The PayPal amount matches the estimated total from your selections.

thanks.title: Thank you!
thanks.body: We received your booking request. Our team will confirm details shortly.
